summary: Frontend-only testing of redesigned Products.jsx and ProductDetail.jsx pages. All features working correctly with premium dark navy + teal B2B aesthetic.
test_credentials: Admin password: admin, Admin login path: /admin/login
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products and ProductDetail pages fully redesigned with dark navy + teal B2B aesthetic. All features tested and working: dark hero banners, breadcrumbs, sidebar filters with division icons/counts, search, pagination, grid/list toggle, product cards with images/badges/SKUs, quote modal with form validation, tabs (Overview/Specifications/Sizes), trust badges, related products, Need Help banner. No B2C Share buttons present. Mobile responsive.

product_detail_page.trust_badges: PASS - ISO 13485, CE Mark, CDSCO, Authorized Distributor
product_detail_page.quote_form_fields: PASS - name, hospital, phone, email, district, message

design_review.cards: rounded-2xl with proper shadows and hover states
design_review.contrast: Good - white/teal text on dark backgrounds, dark text on light backgrounds
